case_title: LUCILA GONZALEZ VS. US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-02-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

MTN TO DISMISS PLTF'S ACTION FILED BY DEFENDANT US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR WAMU MORTGAGE MORTGAGE-BACKED PASS THROUGH CERTIFICATE FOR WMALT SERIES 2006-AR1 HEARING SET FOR NOV-20-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR WAMU MORTGAGE MORTGAGE-BACKED PASS THROUGH CERTIFICATE FOR WMALT SERIES 2006-AR1

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S ACTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ADDRESS ALL ISSUES RAISED BY DEMURRER REGARDING PLAINTIFF'S CAUSES OF ACTION FOR (1) LACK OF STANDING TO FORECLOSE; (2) FRAUD IN THE CONCEALMENT; (3) FRAUD IN THE INDUCEMENT; (4) IIED; (5) QUIET TITLE; (6) SLANDER OF TITLE; (7) DECLARATORY RELIEF; (8) VIOLATION OF CCC 2932.5; (9) VIOLATION OF B&P 17200; AND (10) ACCOUNTING. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE 10 DAYS FORM THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED, (501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Off Calendar

Mtn To Dismiss Pltf'S Action
Off Calendar Nov-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Roxana Vatanparast, Esq., of Bryan Cave (415-675-3400) for US Bank National Association, Defendant and moving party.
No Appearance by Lucila Gonzalez, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff's Action is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment of dismissal are signed in open court.
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rachel Wintterle, Esq., of Bryan Care (415-268-2000) special appearance for US Bank National Association, Defendant and moving party.
Alla Barbalat, Esq., (510-397-8786) special appearance for Lucila Gonzalez, Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to address all issues raised by demurrer regarding Plaintiff's causes of action for (1) lack of standing to foreclose; (2) fraud in the concealment; (3) fraud in the inducement; (4) IIED; (5) Quiet Title; (6) Slander of Title; (7) Declaratory Relief; (8) Violation of CCC 2932.5; (9) Violation of B&P 17200; and (10) accounting. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall have 10 days form the notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. Order is signed in open Court. Judge Peter J. Busch, Clerk M. Goodman, Not Reported, (501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rachel Wintterle, Esq., of Bryan Care (415-268-2000) special appearance for US Bank National Association, Defendant and moving party.
Alla Barbalat, Esq., (510-397-8786) special appearance for Lucila Gonzalez, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT US BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, moot. Judge Peter J. Busch, Clerk M. Goodman, Not Reported, (501)
